name: FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH
short_description: The Unknown Journey Continues... After escaping the city of Midgar, Cloud and his friends set out on a journey across the planet. New adventures await in a vibrant, expansive world in this standalone entry of the FFVII remake trilogy.
supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian, German*, Spanish - Spain, Japanese*, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
